name: @prune/program-slice
description: F17 — Program-Slice Context Selection. Selects context as the backward static slice of a task's seed symbols over a symbol dependency graph: every symbol the seeds transitively depend on, and nothing else. Sound reachability replaces heuristic relevance — a budget-unbounded slice provably drops no needed symbol (Weiser 1981). Forward slices give change-impact sets. Pure graph traversal; no regex, no model call, no fabricated tokens.
